name: Lemon-Poppy Seed Cake
recipeIngredient: 18.25 oz. reduced fat yellow cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 7 ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Beat at medium speed with an electric mixer for 6 minutes.
3. Stir in the poppy seeds.
4. Pour batter into a 10 cup bundt pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and drizzle with Lemon Glaze, then cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Makes 24 servings.
Lemon Glaze:
1/2 cup sifted powdered sugar
2 tbsp lemon juice
Combine powdered sugar and juice, stirring until smooth. Makes 1/4 cup.
